name: Rhubarb Raspberry Platz
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F.
1. Mix together flour, baking powder and sugar in a bowl.
2. Cut in butter (you can use a food processor).
3. Combine egg and cream, adding more cream if needed to form a soft, sticky dough.
4. Pat the dough into a lightly greased 9-inch square cake pan.
5. For the filling, combine fruit, sugar and flour.
6. Mix together egg and melted butter.
7. Add the egg mixture to the fruit filling.
8. Spread evenly over the base.
9. For the topping, mix together flour, sugar and baking powder.
10. Cut in butter, then stir in cream until crumbly.
11. Sprinkle the topping over the fruit filling.
12. Bake at 325°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until golden brown.
13. Serve cut into squares with ice cream or whipped cream.
This recipe is a Mennonite dish, a cross between a pie and coffee cake. From Canadian Living. Any fruit (apple, pear, peach, berries, cherries) will do; adjust sugar according to the tartness of the fruit.
